message:
fix: Pass correct WASM path to Wizer pre-initialization

The runWizerStatic() function was using hardcoded "edgebox-static.wasm"
but the file is actually at the build output path (e.g., zig-out/bin/bench/hello.wasm).

Changes:
- Add wasm_path parameter to runWizerStatic()
- Generate temp output path based on input (file-wizer.wasm)
- Update call site to pass actual wasm_path

This fixes "error.FileNotFound" - Wizer now finds the correct file.
Note: Wizer may still fail with InitFailed due to separate issues.
